name: revit_set_category_visibility
description: Shows or hides categories in a view, or isolates categories of selected elements in the active view.

view_id.description: Target view id; defaults to active view when omitted

category_visibility.description: Map of category name or id to visible (true) or hidden (false)

isolate_element_ids.description: When set, hide all categories then show only categories of these elements

notes: Replace VisibilityCtrlForm and PickObject isolate flow with explicit category_visibility or isolate_element_ids.
